name: TinyFish
description: Hosted browser automation for complex public web workflows.

apiKey.label: TinyFish API Key
apiKey.help: TinyFish API key for hosted browser automation (fallback: TINYFISH_API_KEY env var).

apiKey.description: TinyFish API key. You can also set TINYFISH_API_KEY.

baseUrl.description: Optional TinyFish API base URL. Defaults to https://agent.tinyfish.ai.
